content: Three to five grams of glycine taken before a meal can blunt the blood glucose response to that meal.
Fifteen grams of glycine daily has been shown to improve metabolic health in individuals with type 2 diabetes.
Hydrolyzed collagen provides approximately 1 to 1.67 grams of glycine per serving.
Bone broth is a source of glycine but its exact amount varies depending on conditions and protein content.
Using a hydrolyzed collagen or glycine supplement is recommended for obtaining 3 to 5 grams of glycine per meal.
